column3: MessageText
yo
been what, like two years
you still cracked at shooters or did life finally get you
who is this
ouch. it's me. check the @
...oh
thought you went dark for good
i did. had a reason. showing you tomorrow
keep your rig on
you up?
ok so you know how the ultra-rich just vanish when things get hot
there's a whole hidden dimension they stash everything in. servers, labs, copies of real places
is this a bit
no. i found a way in
out there everything runs on remote robot bodies. untraceable. i can drop you into one
you pilot it like a game. it dies, i just load you into a fresh one. zero risk to the real you
and you need me why
because i need the best player i know. that's not flattery, it's the job
there's a guy out there. ex-stanford ai-ceo, ran surveillance on half the planet, skipped prison by disappearing in here
now he wants to upload himself and live forever in a server. first island we hit is his
i'm streaming the whole run. chat funds it. we expose him in front of everyone
you and me, we mog a billionaire on his own island
ok. i'm listening
knew you still had it
link's open. jump in when you're ready
training_sim.exe
island_raid.exe
column4: Launch the raid on CEO's island
